Hacer un resumen de una película el mismo día que se estrena debería ser castigado con eliminación del canal.
Y peor si apenas y el "resumen" es un guión escrito por ChatGPT.

Penguin Random House is suing OpenAI for alleged copyright infringement

• They say ChatGPT generated text and images 'virtually indistinguishable' from one of their children’s books

• It's 'clear evidence' OpenAI is unlawfully memorizing their author's work

Side by side https://t.co/I6lWdqlgTh

Step 1: Tell Claude Code to create a "design-system.md" from your current app/project

Step 2: Tell it to install Remotion

Step 3: Tell it to make motion graphics of interactions in your app using the design system it created (I did 16:9 for YouTube b-roll).

😎💥💪
